instruction: 把稀有度映射改成 R / SR / SSR / UR 分别提供 1 / 2 / 4 / 7 点全属性，并保留现有触发键、桥接、事件通道和 UI 交互。
instructionSummary: 把稀有度映射改成 R / SR / SSR / UR 分别提供 1 / 2 / 4 / 7 点全属性，并保留现有触发键、桥接、事件通道和 UI 交互。
patchPlanSummary: Update tierToNumber mapping to provide 1/2/4/7 all-attributes for R/SR/SSR/UR tiers while preserving trigger keys, bridging, event channels and UI interactions. (1 op)

operations.reason: Update rarity tier mapping to new all-attributes values: R=1, SR=2, SSR=4, UR=7 as specified in instruction

notes: Only modified the tierToNumber mapping inside the declared boundary
Preserved all trigger keys, bridge registration, event channels and UI interaction patterns
No changes to host wiring, imports, exports, contracts, lifecycle code or unrelated call sites
